title: Common 3-letter words
text: "The" is one of the most common three-letter English words. Compare the pattern of VJG to the shape of THE — does shifting each letter by the same amount turn one into the other?

title: Word type
text:
Try shifting V → T, J → H, and G → E. 
All three letters align with the same shift difference, so VJG most likely corresponds to THE.
